recent_excerpts: Specops Software documents how helpdesk social engineering turns password reset requests into full account compromise — attackers bypass MFA and gain persistent access.
The new 'Storm' infostealer exfiltrates encrypted browser data for server-side decryption, enabling session hijacking and bypassing MFA. Analysis by Varonis details the technique.

The disruption of the Tycoon 2FA phishing-as-a-service platform has led to a surge in copycat attacks, as threat actors reuse its tools and techniques in other kits, increasing the overall volume of m
